title: Playlist
text: Music is the blueprint of my soul. These are the artists who shape the silence between my words.

title: Cinema
text: Movies are waking dreams. These are the ones I can rewatch endlessly, quoting every line like a prayer.

title: TV-shows
text: From hidden gems to mainstream obsessions, these series hold the stories I can't stop thinking about.

title: Places
text: Certain cities feel like home from another life. These are the places where my soul recognizes the air.
